title: Premier Housewares Stainless Steel Hammered Effect Champagne Bucket, 20 x 22 x 22 cm, Silver
features: UNCOMPROMISING QUALITY: Made from non-corrosive stainless steel, our champagne wine ice drinks bucket ensures durability, longevity, and resistance to tarnishing, maintaining its sparkling silver finish for years to come.

CONVENIENT HOOPED HANDLES: Designed with hooped handles dangling gracefully from each side, our hammered ice bucket offers easy portability, is perfect for various occasions and adds a touch of charm to your serving experience.

GUARANTEED SATISFACTION: Rest assured, the sturdy and robust quality of Premier ensures your champagne cooler arrives without any dents or damage, promising long-lasting performance and unforgettable moments with every pour.

EAST MAINTENANCE: Simply wash in warm soapy water for effortless care and use, ensuring your wine cooler remains pristine. Featuring circular indentations created through a precise hammering process it is a centerpiece at any gathering.

VERSATILE FUNCTIONALITY: With dimensions of H21 x L22 x W22cm and a weight of just 0.40kg, our tapered multipurpose ice bucket is perfect for various occasions, whether it's a cozy dinner at home or a lavish party to impress your guests.
description: Premier Housewares Stainless Steel Hammered Effect Champagne Bucket, Height 20 cm x Width 22 cm x Depth 22 cm Be the perfect host with the champagne bucket by serving a perfectly chilled glass at your party. The hammered effect stainless steel design will add a stylish look while making sure your wine is kept chilled. Handles on the side will allow you to easily carry the bucket to were required. A fantastic centrepiece on your table makes it suitable for a romantic dinner for two or parties. So there is no need to finish the champagne quickly, just relax and enjoy the flavours knowing that both you and the bottle will be having a chilled night. Premier Housewares Limited is part of a family run group of companies with over 50 years of trading experience and prides itself as one of the UK’s leading suppliers and distributors of housewares and home lifestyle products to the retail trade. First established in 1988, Premier Housewares has grown to a market leader in its industry, based in a head office of over 340,000 sq. feet on the banks of the river Clyde, close to the heart of Glasgow, Scotland. With an extensive product portfolio that covers kitchenware, tabletop and bathroom accessories, as well as soft furnishing, decorative accessories, lighting and furniture, Premier’s aim is to provide a complete solution to housewares retailing needs by offering a comprehensive collection of coordinating products in eye-catching packaging. Premier Housewares pride themselves on offering one of the most comprehensive ranges of housewares in the industry and ensure that as their range continues to develop emphasis is always on classic, contemporary design at value for money prices. Premier’s range is constantly reviewed and developed by a team of buyers dedicated to each specific product area.
